zh.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoy是Purefoy和Nicolls的女兒，於1533年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯。她和Sir Thomas Thorne至少有6個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1589年5月9日在她的家鄉享年56歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoy是Purefoy和Nicolls的女儿，于1533年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯。她和Sir Thomas Thorne至少有6个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于1589年5月9日在她的家乡享年56岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾亞德利 海斯廷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Purefoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French par fei ‘by (my) faith’, a nickname for someone who habitually used this expression. Compare Purifoy . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoy was born in 1533, in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of Purefoy and Nicolls. She had at least 6 sons and 7 daughters with Sir Thomas Thorne. She died on 9 May 1589, in her hometown, at the age of 56, and was buried in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoy est née en 1533, à Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fille de Purefoy et Nicolls. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles avec Sir Thomas Thorne. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1589, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoy wurde 1533 in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England, als Tochter von Purefoy und Nicolls geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas Thorne mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1589 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoy è nata il nel 1533 nel Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England come figlia di Purefoy e Nicolls. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie con Sir Thomas Thorne. Morì il 9 maggio 1589, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoyは1533年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヤードリー ハスティングズでPurefoyとNicollsの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir Thomas Thorneとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1589年5月9日に故郷で56歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアヤードリー ハスティングズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoy(은)는 1533년 영국 노르섬프토실르 야어들리 하스틴그스에서 Purefoy(와)과 Nicolls의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Thorne(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1589년 5월 9일 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 야어들리 하스틴그스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoy nasceu em 1533, em Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de Purefoy e Nicolls. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas com Sir Thomas Thorne. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1589, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoy родилась в 1533 г. в местности ярдли хастингс, нортамптоншир, Англия. Её родителей звали Purefoy и Nicolls. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей от Sir Thomas Thorne. Она умерла 9 мая 1589 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности ярдли хастингс, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Purefoy nació en 1533, en Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hija de Purefoy y Nicolls. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas con Sir Thomas Thorne. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1589, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Yardley Hastings, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
